steps.title: Combine like terms directly
steps.content: All terms have the same variable part $x^5$, so add/subtract coefficients directly: $$ 8 + 11 - 6 $$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: Calculate the arithmetic: $ 8 + 11 = 19 $, then $ 19 - 6 = 13 $. The simplified form is $ 13x^5 $. The answer is 13.
